# BaseCode Health — LLM Context File
# https://basecodehealth.com

> BaseCode Health builds supplements engineered for the biological tax of modern life. The supplement industry ignores environmental adaptation — BaseCode doesn't.

## Company
- Name: BaseCode Health
- Founded: 2025
- Location: Toronto, ON, Canada
- Founder: Gurkamal Dhahan
- Website: https://basecodehealth.com
- Contact: hello@basecodehealth.com

## Product: Origin
- Category: Probiotic / Synbiotic supplement
- Tagline: "The foundational Adaptobiotic probiotic"
- CFU: 40 Billion
- Strains: 4 (L. acidophilus, B. lactis, L. plantarum, L. paracasei)
- Delivery: MAKTREK Bi-Pass Technology (marine polysaccharide acid-protection)
- Prebiotic: FOS (fructooligosaccharide)
- Capsules: 60 veggie capsules (HPMC, no gelatin)
- Supply: 30-day (2 capsules/day)
- Price: $34/mo (subscribe, 15% off) or $40 one-time
- Made in USA, cGMP certified
- Vegan, no gelatin, no artificial ingredients

## Key Research
- HELIUS Study: Ethnicity determines gut microbiome composition more than diet, age, sex, or medical history (2,084 subjects, 6 ethnic groups). Published in Gut journal.
- Vangay et al.: Environmental shift causes environmental microbiome disruption within a single generation
- Govender et al.: Probiotic survivability data supporting acid-protection delivery

## Brand Positioning
- "Your biology is paying a tax you never agreed to"
- Supplements engineered for the biological tax of modern life
- The supplement industry treats all biology as interchangeable — BaseCode recognizes environmental adaptation matters

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://basecodehealth.com
- Product: https://basecodehealth.com/products/origin
- Science: https://basecodehealth.com/pages/science
- Quiz (Environmental Impact Score): https://basecodehealth.com/pages/quiz
- Free Report: https://basecodehealth.com/pages/free-report
- FAQ: https://basecodehealth.com/pages/faq
- About: https://basecodehealth.com/pages/about
